## Official Websites

- [https://www.blackberry.com/](https://www.blackberry.com/)

## Brand Guidelines

### 2007

**Logo Information:**

- The BlackBerry logo appears in multiple variations including horizontal versions and color-restricted options.

**Color Information:**

- Primary and Accent color palettes are provided for Business Marketing and End-User materials.

**Typography Information:**

- Typography details are provided with specified roles for headline and body text.

**Imagery Photography:**

- Guidelines specify the use of brand imagery, smartphone photography, and misuse examples.

**Spacing Layout:**

- Clear space and minimum size requirements for the logo are detailed to maintain integrity.

**Brand Voice:**

- Voice words and their treatment are examined to guide branding tone consistency.

**Notes:**

- Visual elements, data flow patterns, and their stylistic misuse examples are discussed in depth.

### 2019

*Guidelines data not available*

## Promotion Insights

### Color Analysis
*Statistics computed across 934 images*

| Color | Mean |
|-------|------|
| Dark Blue | 51.3% |
| White | 38.9% |
| Black | 31.3% |
| Royal Blue | 26.3% |
| Gray | 18.6% |
| Blue | 18.4% |
| Light Blue | 17.3% |
| Dark Brown | 16.5% |

### Tone Distribution

| Tone | Mean |
|------|------|
| Warm | 2.2% |
| Neutral | 46.0% |
| Cool | 51.9% |
